subject: A massive humanoid Titan figure from Attack on Titan, mouth agape wide, viewed from below against a cloudy sky
description: The image fills the frame almost entirely with an extreme low-angle close-up of a Titan's enormous face and upper chest. The creature's mouth is stretched open to an inhuman width, revealing teeth and a cavernous throat. The skin is pale and moist-looking. A leather Scout Regiment harness emblem is partially visible on the chest. The background is a bright sky with white clouds. A SAMPLE watermark is overlaid on the image at the card's resolution.
foreground: Titan face, massive open mouth, pale skin, Scout harness partially visible
